_description: Step 8: Create Check Templates that group multiple Validation Checks. Requires: validation-checks from step 07. NOTE: 'checks' field expects list of ValidationCheck IDs.

data.name: Campus L3 Full Check
data.description: Comprehensive pre/post check template for Layer-3 campus switches. Includes routing, adjacency, NTP, and resource validation.

data.name: Campus L2 Quick Check
data.description: Lightweight check template for access-layer switches. Focuses on interface state, CDP, and STP.

data.name: Data Center Spine Check
data.description: DC spine-specific checks including BGP underlay validation.

data.name: SD-WAN Edge Check
data.description: SD-WAN edge router checks focusing on overlay and underlay health.

_note: Replace __ID_*__ placeholders with actual ValidationCheck IDs returned from step 07. Example: if 'BGP Neighbors' was created with id=1, replace __ID_BGP_NEIGHBORS__ with 1.
